title: Amtech C3125 2 Piece radiator key set - clock Type
features: SQUARE OPENING DESIGN: These square opening radiator keys are designed for bleeding air from standard radiator heating systems
DURABLE BUILD: Made to withstand regular use in demanding environments
VERSATILE SIZE: Suitable for a wide range of household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 2Pc Radiator Keys (Clock Type) See more
